prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年约4917名，2023年因断档跌至约13249名，2024年回升至约5700名，2025年约6944名；近两年位次在5700-6944区间波动，2025年较2024年后移约1200名， 基准位次约6944名；2022-2023年本省计划均为29人，2024年增至32人，2025年增至37人，2026年计划42人，较2025年扩招5人（约13.5%）；扩招使竞争 略有加剧，位次数字相应后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第55名，近年排名稳定在49-55区间，属全国中上游水平；第五轮学科评估中，作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，农林学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，涉及图书馆表白墙事件但影响有限；2026年周期内未见明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第102位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量不高，报考关 注度平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐），该校相关专业招生对考生有一定吸引力；本省2026年考生总数约66000 人（含不确定标记），按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算物理类考生约44550人，与2025年基本持平；南京农业大学位于江苏 南京，属长三角发达地区，对宁夏考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在宁夏招生占比约2%（2025年该校全国总招生约598人，宁夏12人），属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合202 5年基准位次约6944名、2026年扩招约13.5%使位次后移约563名、本省考生规模基本持平、声誉热度平稳、电子信息类等热门专业吸引考生等因素，在；预测2026年最低位次约7487名，区间6987-7987名。

- 园艺。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在6987-7987区间内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（6987名以内）可重点冲击电子信息类、植物保护等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（7987名附近）应以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 4917th in 2022, dropped to about 13249th in 2023 due to a gap, rebounded to about 5700th in 2024, and about 6944th in 2025; rankings fluctuated between 5700-6944 in recent two years, with 2025 shifting back about 1200 places compared to 2024, baseline ranking about 6944th; provincial plan was 29 students in both 2022 and 2023, increased to 32 in 2024, 37 in 2025, and 42 in 2026, an expansion of 5 students (about 13.5%) compared to 2025; expansion slightly intensifies competition, causing ranking numbers to shift back accordingly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked about 55th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 49-55 range in recent years, at the upper-middle level nationally; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, with outstanding agricultural and forestry disciplines, providing sustained appeal for related majors; reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, involving a library confession wall incident but with limited impact; no significant negative public opinion observed in the 2026 cycle; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 102nd, rated as "average", with low short video exposure and stable application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity (both highly recommended in 2024), and the university's related majors attract some applicants; total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 66,000 (including uncertain marks), with physics category candidates estimated at about 44,550 based on recent physics category proportion of about 67.5%, roughly the same as 2025; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2% (about 598 total national enrollment in 2025, 12 in Ningxia), at a moderately low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 6944th, the 2026 expansion of about 13.5% causing a ranking shift back of about 563 places, the provincial candidate scale remaining roughly stable, stable reputation and popularity, and the attraction of popular majors like electronic information, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 7487th, with a range of 6987-7987th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings in the 6987-7987 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 6987th), focus on Tier 1 flagship majors like Electronic Information and Plant Protection; if ranking is near the upper limit (around 7987th), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
